name: Kameleoon A/B Testing & Feature Management API
what_it_does: A/B testing, feature flag, and personalization platform with REST and GraphQL management APIs plus client SDKs — targeting European enterprise market with strong GDPR compliance, AI-powered personalization, and server-side experimentation.
use_cases: Managing A/B test experiments and feature flag rollouts programmatically via API
Querying experiment results and statistical significance for reporting agents
Configuring AI-powered personalization rules for specific audience segments
Integrating feature flags into deployment pipelines for canary release automation
Auditing experiment configuration changes for compliance and review workflows
not_for: Simple feature flags without experimentation needs (use ConfigCat or Flipt)
North American-focused teams on tight budgets (Kameleoon targets enterprise EU)
Self-hosted feature flag without cloud dependency
best_when: A European enterprise needs A/B testing with strong GDPR compliance, AI personalization, and server-side SDK for programmatic experimentation.
avoid_when: You need a lightweight feature flag solution — Kameleoon is a full experimentation platform priced for enterprise.

auth.notes: OAuth2 client credentials for management API access. SDK uses site code for client-side experimentation. Access tokens expire and require refresh. Project and environment-scoped access.

pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise pricing based on monthly visitors; contact sales
pricing.notes: Visitor-based pricing model. Enterprise pricing with annual contracts. French company with strong European presence. More expensive than US alternatives but stronger GDPR position.

performance.rate_limits: Management API: rate limits per access token; SDK evaluation is local (no latency)

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST and GraphQL management APIs documented. Server-side SDKs well-documented for experimentation integration. Error responses are JSON. Webhook delivery for experiment events.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Read operations are idempotent. Experiment creation is idempotent by name. Flag variation assignments are deterministic for same visitor ID.
known_agent_gotchas: Management API and experimentation SDK are separate authentication flows
EU data residency means API endpoints differ for EU vs global deployments
Statistical significance calculations are done server-side — query results API for data
AI personalization rules require training data — not instant after configuration

security_score_components.security_notes: GDPR, CCPA, SOC2, ISO 27001. OAuth2 for management API. TLS enforced. EU data residency. Strong GDPR compliance is core differentiator. Server-side SDK means visitor data can stay on your servers.
